notes: Justified divergences or deferred parity gaps. Source names use simple-type-based keys such as TextEditor.MemberName.

ignoredTypes.name: TextAreaAutomationPeer
ignoredTypes.reason: WPF automation peer surface has no direct Uno desktop equivalent in the current host.

ignoredTypes.name: TextRangeProvider
ignoredTypes.reason: WPF UI Automation text provider is intentionally deferred until a concrete accessibility pass.

mappedMembers.reason: UnoEdit allows external highlighted-line providers, including TextMate, through IHighlightedLineSource instead of the WPF-specific colorizer injection path.
